---
title: "Week 8 - Chapter 7"
format: html
editor: visual
---

:::::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Announcements and Agenda

::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
-   **R Exam is TWO WEEKS.** After Spring Break. See the [study guide](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1wxGpG6tgWBtf7e74zRbrOZAWFu8E7XXdyBu1qEi6BM4/edit?usp=sharing).
    -   open-note and open-internet
    -   take in class
-   **Brain Exam #1.** Graded & Key & "Learning From" Assignment Posted
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Today, on Psych 214...**

-   **8:55 - 10:00.** Check-In and Linear Model Review.
-   **10:00 - 10:10.** Break Time.
-   **10:10 - 11:00.** Linear Model with a Categorical IV
:::
:::::
::::::

### Class Slides and Materials

```{=html}
<iframe data-external="1" class="slide-deck" src="/dvcstats/slides/ch7.html" width="100%" height="900px" title=""></iframe>
```

-   [**Check-In. Linear Model Review**](https://forms.gle/JwNfsjJubhzzZJJX8). Purposefully vague!
    -   [**Narcissism Data**](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/p1yc5kvkckkwok2v19jl5/narcissism_data.csv?rlkey=y0zwtllmfsie447eybxa4965u&dl=0). For the check-in.
-   [**R EXAM STUDY GUIDE**](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1wxGpG6tgWBtf7e74zRbrOZAWFu8E7XXdyBu1qEi6BM4/edit?usp=sharing)**.** It will be chill.
-   **Professor R Scripts \[[Zoom Room](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/ofchakmk3d1ep17u2r5r5/APTz8gRoQo9AHhw2XPY5TZs?rlkey=mdept9ym448grm4vya184bbrd&dl=0) + [Room Crew](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/fa4okobq89jhhj0wthgy5/AHJsWr-fakA7N8JnlLZHKIs?rlkey=hfw992f7lj8nzfbcz6qp7n2og&dl=0)\]**

# For Next Week.

### Lab 6. Complete a Practice Exam from the Study Guide

-   set a timer for two hours.

    -   see how far you can get

    -   open-note; open-internet; adhere to course AI policy.

-   use the key AFTER you get stuck for at least 10 minutes.
